target_areas.name: Canon and target identity
target_areas.v7_1_baseline_intent: v7.1 defines Canon and target identity as part of the candidate-only Universal Work and app-sovereign architecture.
target_areas.v7_1_1_clarification: v7.1.1 positions Canon and target identity by its role in small-model power, QIRC coordination, Thor/Handoff where relevant, and claim-boundary governance.
target_areas.internal_q_pattern_meaning: Q-pattern lineage is recognized only as neutral Odin operational structure; no private mythology is required for public usage.
required_operational_behavior: declare v7.1 baseline plus v7.1.1 target sharpening
separate target canon from repo-real implementation status
preserve historical ladders as traceability only
non_claims: target architecture is not implementation proof
target_areas.next_ladder_recommendation: Use V711-CANON as a narrow implementation slice only after coverage/gap classification records repo-real evidence and retained gaps.

target_areas.name: Small-model performance operating layer
target_areas.v7_1_baseline_intent: v7.1 defines Small-model performance operating layer as part of the candidate-only Universal Work and app-sovereign architecture.
target_areas.v7_1_1_clarification: v7.1.1 positions Small-model performance operating layer by its role in small-model power, QIRC coordination, Thor/Handoff where relevant, and claim-boundary governance.
target_areas.internal_q_pattern_meaning: Q-pattern lineage is recognized only as neutral Odin operational structure; no private mythology is required for public usage.
required_operational_behavior: coordinate Context Distillery, Worklets, Slot Forge, Gaptext, critics, tournament, cache, dojo, scoreboard, and Candidate DNA as one small-model operating layer
prefer deterministic/no-model and smallest sufficient local routes before escalation
make 3B and 7B/8B routes receive bounded slot work instead of broad prompts
preserve no live model inference or model quality claims without receipts
required_tests: module coverage tests for small-model layer
claim-boundary tests for no benchmark proof
non_claims: target architecture is not implementation proof
target_areas.next_ladder_recommendation: Build measurable but candidate-only small-model operating slices, starting with context/slot/model-packet/critic receipts.
